Appearance

MetrixHigh-Performance Graph Database

Embeddable C++20 graph database engine with Cypher query support

Get Started
View on GitHub

High Performance

Custom file-based storage with segment-based architecture for optimal speed.

ACID Transactions

Full transaction support with Write-Ahead Logging (WAL) for data durability.

Cypher Query

Native support for the Cypher query language with ANTLR4-based parser.

Vector Indexes

Built-in support for vector similarity search and AI workloads.

Embeddable

Easy integration into C++ applications with both C++ and C APIs.

Open Source

MIT licensed for easy inclusion in your projects.

Released under the MIT License.
